itemListElement.reviewBody: Gurukul school wale chor lutere hai, mere 10000 jo unhone admission ke time liye thei aur as per t&c bache ke 10th clear karne par dene thei bematlab ke bahane banake return nahi kar rahe, bahut bekar school hai 😡😡

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody: Teachers beat and scream over children if a girl child is seen wearing a Payal to school. They have come out with a new rule and asked girl students of secondary to not to wear earrings. This is a wierd rule. What connection does this rule has with providing quality education to children? Plus earings, payal etc jwellery is common sply if you are hindu. The worst part is principal and teachers do not leave any space purposefully for an open conversation between parents and teachers. Everything is communicated through children which makes no sense for very young kids. Parents must be involved & communicated Directly via an open channel for communication. Uniform selection (choice of colour of uniform) is very poor and they charge so much money for different uniforms. Many teachers practice shouting business instead of being kind and loving towards children sply for primary.

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am extremely disappointed with this school. They sell books, uniforms, and everything else at extremely high prices. It feels like they are running a business rather than an educational institution. The focus is more on making money than on providing quality education. I strongly advise against choosing this school. It's a terrible experience, and I regret enrolling my child here. The school is very bad, and it feels more like a business than a place for learning.

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody: Class test for Pre primary and Primary levels are not there . Even Children have to study extra 6 or 7 subjects apart from State Board Subjects. 3 Uniforms for Children from Grade 5. Children have to study Sanskrit Compulsory from Grade 5 which is so embarrsing . As other school provides option from Grade 8.

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody: Guys they charge Rs.500/- for basic inquiry. They don’t provide any details of admission unless you pay money. Have asked to provide the same in writing, they didn’t had any answer for that rather they told me taking admission is not compulsory here. Escalated the issue to principal but even she was of the same opinion. Went there becoz it was near to my home and now after seeing below reviews I feel my experience is not different and why have I even entered the premises. my elder son studies on Podar and appreciate the transparency maintained by them and other reputed schools nearby.

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Not providing I card
Even after charging fees for I card

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I went to this school for the inquiry of admission of grade-I. First of all the staff was very rude, they made us waited for almost half and hour and then they insisted to take admission form (500rs) before inquiring anything about admission.

This is pathetic, I mean, I haven't seen any school in life, which demands to pay 500rs before admission inquiry.

I heard few positive things about this school and that was the reason I went for an inquiry.

But it looks like that was a rumour.

They don't have any ethics and morals. It's only money making school.

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath
Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst school ever I have seen. Favoritisum and partially decision always taken by teachers. Mannerless staff , teachers,  accounts section everyone talks rudely , they have opened business firm and not a school. They Never except their mistakes always point to students and parents. If you want better future of your child don't take admission in this school .

itemReviewed.name: Gurukul Grand Union High School & Jr.College - Ambernath

itemListElement.reviewBody: Partiality, favouritism at peak. No proper method presented for grade and CGPA calculation. No proper portion completion. Everything is omitted. No teachers know maths. Worst. South Indian school or infant Jesus is better than this
